creator: corky1951@comcast.net
text:
Update to version 1.1.7

	This is a minor bugfix release. rdup-up has one new feature: it also creates named pipes (fifos).

Fix: One file deleted from the port (files/patch-rdup-tr.c) since it provided a bugfix which has now been merged into the upstream sourcecode.

files/patch-sh__rdup-simple.in modified to reflect some changes in upstream code.

Makefile and distinfo modified as usual per version update.
